howItWorks.title: Your AI co-pilot. Always one step ahead.
howItWorks.step1Description: Define what great looks like. Paste your job description and set your must-haves and no-goes. Applyze builds a custom scoring rubric so the AI knows exactly what you're looking for.
howItWorks.step2Description: Upload once. Get ranked instantly. Drop in CVs in bulk. Your AI co-pilot analyses every application and returns a ranked shortlist — so your team starts from the top, not from scratch.
howItWorks.step3Description: Candidates are ranked and explained — not just scored. Every profile comes with a full AI brief so your recruiters spend time on the people that matter, not on filtering noise.

applicationFlood.pivotSub: Applyze reads every CV. Scores every candidate. And hands you the shortlist — in minutes.

gdpr.title: The world's highest data privacy standard. Built in from day one.
gdpr.sub: GDPR compliance isn't a checkbox for us — it's architecture. Every decision we made building Applyze started with data protection.
gdpr.card1Body: All data is stored and processed exclusively on EU-based servers. Applyze is built for European teams — not adapted for them.
gdpr.card2Body: Every action on every candidate is logged. Know exactly who reviewed what, and when. Export your full audit log anytime.
gdpr.card3Body: Built-in support for GDPR Art. 15, 17 & 20. Data export, right to erasure, and automatic deletion policies — all included.
gdpr.card4Body: Candidates cannot manipulate AI scoring by embedding hidden instructions in their CVs. Applyze uses multiple layers of safeguards to ensure every analysis is based on merit, not trickery.
gdpr.highlight: Applyze is fully GDPR compliant — not just for Europe, but as a global standard for candidate data privacy. Because everyone deserves to be treated with care.

trustStrip.trust1: Built for EU AI Act High-Risk Systems

faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.a0: Applyze analyses each CV against your job description and scores the candidate across six dimensions: Hard Skills, Experience, Tools, Impact, Signals, and Risk. Each dimension is scored 0–10 and combined into an overall match percentage. Every score is explainable — you can see exactly why a candidate ranked where they did. No black boxes.
faq.a1: Applyze accepts PDF, DOCX, TXT, and RTF files. You can upload candidates one by one or in bulk. We recommend PDF for best results.
faq.q2: How does the Decision Room work?
faq.a2: Once you've reviewed your shortlist, select the candidates you want to share and generate a Decision Room link. Send it to any hiring manager or stakeholder — they don't need an Applyze account. They can review each candidate's AI brief, scores, strengths and risks, and vote to Interview or Reject. Results sync back to your pipeline automatically. Links are valid for 14 days.
faq.a3: Blind Mode removes all identifying information from candidate profiles before your team reviews them — including name, photo, age, gender, nationality, ethnicity, and religion signals. What remains is pure merit: skills, experience, achievements, and match score. This helps eliminate unconscious bias and leads to fairer, more defensible hiring decisions.
faq.a4: Yes — fully. Applyze is built for European hiring teams and GDPR compliance is core to our architecture. All data is stored and processed on EU-based servers exclusively. You have full access to audit logs, data export (Art. 20), and candidate erasure (Art. 17) at any time. Candidate data is never used to train AI models.
faq.a5: Applyze runs on a monthly credit model — not a long-term contract. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan at any time. Unused credits from your monthly plan do not carry over, so we recommend choosing a plan that matches your actual hiring volume.
